data.title: G-SHOCK reveals Pink Ribbon Model GMAS145PK-4A, supporting Breast Cancer Research Foundation.
data.description: Casio America, Inc. has unveiled the Pink Ribbon Model GMAS145PK-4A, a durable timepiece designed to support Breast Cancer Research Foundation. This is the third special-edition watch released by the company, aiming to raise awareness and funds for breast cancer research. Released on September 24, 2025, the timepiece is a symbol of solidarity, featuring a sleek design with a pink ribbon motif. A portion of the proceeds from the sales of this timepiece will be donated to support research efforts.

data.title: Vital Inpatient named finalist in 2025 A.I. Awards for best use of personalization in patient experience. #AI #Healthcare.
data.description: The recognition of AI innovation showcases Vital's role in enhancing and customizing the patient experience. Based in CLAYMONT, Del., on Sept. 24, 2025, Vital's AI-driven patient experience tool, Vital Inpatient, has been selected as a top contender for The 2025 A.I. Awards. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to revolutionizing healthcare with cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Wood Partners begins construction on 328 residences by Lake Fairview in Orlando, Florida. Leading multifamily developer.
data.description: A reputable developer specializing in multifamily properties is set to complete the construction of 328 residences situated along Lake Fairview, positioned between Winter Park and Orlando's College Park neighborhood. This initiative was disclosed by Wood Partners, a prominent national developer focused on multifamily housing. The project, known as The Edgewater, is set to commence soon.

data.title: Dog Ruby accidentally ate eczema cream, causing potential fatal overdose in Minneapolis. Owners thought she had a stroke.
data.description: In Minneapolis on September 24, 2025, a toxic exposure incident led to a potentially fatal overdose for a dog named Ruby, belonging to the Clark family. Like many pets, Ruby had a favorite spot in the house that her family would check when looking for her. The family initially feared she had suffered a stroke, but they later discovered that Ruby had been poisoned. The incident serves as a reminder of the dangers that toxic substances can pose to pets, prompting owners to be vigilant in keeping harmful items out of reach. The specific substance and the amount ingested were not disclosed, but the incident highlights the importance of pet safety and prompt medical attention in cases of suspected poisoning.

data.title: Law firm investigating claims for LifeMD investors with losses over $75,000 from May 7 - August 5, 2025. Contact for options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is advising investors who experienced losses of over $75,000 in LifeMD between May 7, 2025, and August 5, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion regarding potential options. If you fit this criteria and wish to explore further, do not hesitate to contact him directly.

data.title: GuidePoint Security and Cloud Security Alliance debut SaaS Security Capability Framework (SSCF) to set app security standards.
data.description: A new SaaS Security Capability Framework (SSCF) has been introduced through a collaboration between GuidePoint Security and the Cloud Security Alliance in Reston, Virginia. This framework aims to enhance security measures for Software as a Service (SaaS) products.

data.title: WellSky introduces CarePort Referral Intake solution, using AI summaries to enhance care transitions for post-acute providers.
data.description: In Overland Park, Kansas, the WellSky CarePort Referral Intake solution is utilizing AI-powered document summaries to enhance care transitions for post-acute providers. This technology aims to improve efficiency and effectiveness in the referral intake process, ultimately benefiting providers in delivering quality care.

data.title: Children's entertainer Ryan Woodall releases debut picture book on ADHD & mental health with Brown Books Kids - a valuable resource for parents & educators.
data.description: In Dallas, Ryan K. Woodall of Faith Channel introduces an engaging take on ADHD through his first children's book, The Distraction Monster. Published by Brown Books Kids, the book is now accessible and features illustrations by Stevie Mahardhika. Timely for the back-to-school period, The Distraction Monster is a helpful tool for parents and educators to guide children with ADHD in regulating their conduct and discovering harmony in their lively, creative realms. The book's main character provides a relatable and insightful perspective for kids dealing with ADHD.

data.title: HTC VIVERSE launches global university hackathon "VIVERSE Spark" in which students build immersive worlds, compete for cash prizes and XR hardware.
data.description: A global hackathon hosted by VIVERSE, the 3D content platform by HTC, is inviting university students worldwide to participate in creating immersive worlds. Participants will have the chance to build and interact with others in their dream virtual environments. The competition, known as VIVERSE Spark, offers cash prizes and XR hardware rewards. Students will showcase their creativity by developing immersive projects in VIVERSE under submission categories like Immersive Story. This event marks a unique opportunity for students to explore the potential of virtual reality and 3D technology.

data.title: Dow Jones up before home data; Micron AI stock falls on earnings. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase as investors awaited the release of new home sales data. Micron, a prominent AI stock, saw a decline in its value following disappointing earnings. The stock market displayed a positive trend with the Dow rising, contrasting with the decrease in Micron's performance. The market's attention was particularly focused on the upcoming home sales data, which is anticipated to impact trading decisions.

data.title: SutiExpense updates with new features and integrations for better expense management. Integration with Sage and Microsoft Dynamics 365.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on September 24, 2025, SutiExpense has launched enhanced features and integrations to provide a smooth user experience for expense reporting. The platform now integrates with top systems like Sage and Microsoft Dynamics 365, enhancing usability and efficiency for users. This update aims to streamline the expense reporting process and increase functionality for businesses.

data.title: Planet Smilez is addressing shortage of oral health professionals by creating pathways for students through early exposure and mentorship.
data.description: Baltimore, September 24, 2025 - Planet Smilez is taking action amidst the nationwide scarcity of oral health experts by establishing a program to groom future professionals. By focusing on early introduction, practical training, and mentorship for students from diverse educational backgrounds, they aim to address the issue.

data.title: Renowned Madagascar conservationist Dr. Lily-Arison René de Roland to be honored at 2025 Indianapolis Prize Gala on Sept 27.
data.description: The upcoming gala on September 27 at downtown Indianapolis will honor Dr. Lily-Arison René de Roland, the 2025 recipient of the prestigious Indianapolis Prize. This award is recognized as the most prominent in the field of animal conservation globally.

data.title: Tips from FSA Store® and HSA Store® aid in choosing and using FSAs and HSAs, aiming to simplify healthcare access and save on taxes.
data.description: In Dallas on September 24, 2025, it was emphasized that educating and raising awareness about FSAs and HSAs can assist individuals in selecting the best plan, increasing tax savings, and streamlining their access to healthcare services and products. With open enrollment season beginning, millions of Americans will need to make crucial decisions regarding their healthcare options. By providing information and understanding about these plans, individuals can make informed choices that could help them save money and simplify their healthcare experience.

data.title: Micron beats Q4 estimates with revenue of $11.32B and EPS of $3.03. Ends quarter with $11.94B cash. Q1 revenue guidance of $12.5B +/- $300M.
data.description: Micron Technology Inc.'s stock, listed on NASDAQ as MU, has been on the rise due to the strong quarterly results released. The company surpassed analyst predictions for both revenue and adjusted earnings in the fourth quarter, reporting $11.32 billion in revenue compared to the estimated $11.22 billion, and $3.03 in adjusted earnings per share compared to the estimated $2.86. Operating cash flow for the quarter stood at $5.73 billion, with $803 million in free cash flow. Micron closed the quarter with $11.94 billion in cash, marketable investments, and restricted cash. The company has projected first-quarter revenue to be around $12.5 billion, with a margin of error of plus or minus $300 million. Multiple analysts have subsequently raised their price targets for Micron following the positive results.

data.title: Armlogi Holding (NASDAQ: BTOC) to report quarterly earnings on 2025-09-25 with analysts expecting EPS of $-0.04. Investors await results.
data.description: Armlogi Holding, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BTOC, is set to disclose its quarterly earnings on Thursday, September 25, 2025. Analysts project that the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.04. There is significant anticipation surrounding the earnings release, as investors are eager to see if Armlogi Holding will exceed these expectations. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: KNOT Offshore Partners (NYSE: KNOP) prepares for earnings report on Sep 25, 2025, with estimated EPS of $0.18, eagerly awaited by investors.
data.description: KNOT Offshore Partners (NYSE: KNOP) is scheduled to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, September 25, 2025. Analysts predict the company will announce an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.18. Investors are eagerly awaiting this announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming period. Stay informed with the full article available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Austin-based EGBI receives $42K grant from FHLB Dallas, Encore Bank, and Texas Capital for business incubator program.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, a $42,000 Partnership Grant Program (PGP) award will be celebrated at 3:00 p.m. on Tuesday, September 30, 2025. The grant is a collaboration between the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas), Encore Bank, and Texas Capital. The recipient of the award, the Economic Growth Business Incubator (EGBI), is a nonprofit in Austin that offers training, coaching, and support to individuals looking to establish or expand their businesses but encounter obstacles.
